name: Giselle's Acadian Plogues (Ployes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients: white buckwheat flour, regular flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. Gradually add cold water to the dry mixture until combined.
3. Allow the batter to rest for 10 minutes.
4. Stir in boiling water.
5. Drop spoonfuls of the batter onto a hot griddle (400°F).
6. Cook on one side only until bubbled and firm, about 2-3 minutes.
7. Serve warm on a platter, covered with napkins.
